title: The Adventures of Tom Sawyer, Part 7.
summaries:
"The Adventures of Tom Sawyer, Part 7" by Mark Twain is a novel published in 1876.

Tom Sawyer, a mischievous boy growing up along the Mississippi River, experiences adventures that test his courage and conscience. From witnessing a murder in a graveyard to getting lost in a cave, Tom navigates childhood rebellion, first love, and dangerous encounters with criminals. Alongside his friend Huckleberry Finn, he faces moral dilemmas about truth and loyalty in a small Missouri town during the 1830s-1840s. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
